arts.ttl: Reece James back on Chelsea sidelines after sustaining new hamstring injury
arts.sum: Blues’ club captain has history of hamstring issues Enzo Maresca unsure on time frame for recovery Reece James has sustained another hamstring injury and will miss Chelsea’s Premier League visit to Leicester on Saturday, with his manager, Enzo Maresca, unsure as to the time frame on the recovery. James felt the problem in training on Tuesday and it is the latest blow for the captain, who underwent hamstring surgery in December which ruled him out until the final few games of last season. He injured a hamstring again on Chelsea’s pre-season tour of the United States and played his first match of the campaign at Liverpool on 20 October. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: ‘Amazing’ Chelsea player is actually the highest-rated player in his position this season
arts.sum: Chelsea have had a number of players reach arguably the highest level they have shown in the Premier League under the new manager. Enzo Maresca...

arts.ttl: John Terry names Chelsea prospect who reminds him of younger self
arts.sum: Chelsea legend John Terry has named the emerging defensive prospect that he sees his younger self in, praising the home-grown player's attitude as much as his talent.

arts.ttl: Leicester City issue statement after crypto gambling sponsor declared BANKRUPT
arts.sum: Two companies which run Leicester sponsor BC.Game, an online gambling and gaming platform which uses cryptocurrency, has been declared bankrupt in a court in Curacao

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca reveals Joao Felix's future
arts.sum: Chelsea manager Enzo Maresca has dropped a big hint on the future of Joao Felix . Fabrizio Romano has reported on X that Enzo Maresca made a comment about Joao Felix's future ahead of the return of Premier League football this weekend.

arts.ttl: 'I have a feeling': Paul Merson predicts the result for Leicester vs Chelsea on Saturday
arts.sum: Leicester City and Chelsea face each other in Saturday’s early kick-off this weekend as the Premier League returns with an intriguing fixture. All eyes will...

arts.ttl: Christian Pulisic sends cryptic message after former Chelsea ace did Donald Trump dance
arts.sum: Christian Pulisic has become a controversial figure in recent days, and it all stemmed from the former Chelsea attacker using Donald Trump's dance moves in celebration of a goal for the US Men's National Team. Running over the corner flag, he stopped dead in his tracks and switched to a double fist-pump dance associated with President-elect Trump during his recent election campaign.

arts.ttl: Chelsea dealt welcome injury boost as £19m summer transfer return date scheduled
arts.sum: The 19-year-old joined the Blues from Aston Villa for £19million during the summer but has seen the start to his career at Stamford Bridge disrupted. He signed his first professional contract in the September of that year before making his first-team debut the following season during a 3-0 win over Hibernian in the Europa Conference League.

arts.ttl: Reece James' injury history at Chelsea is shocking, he's missed over 100 games and counting
arts.sum: Reece James has been so unlucky...

arts.ttl: Why Chelsea should sell Reece James
arts.sum: It averages out at 21.5 games missed every season since he signed his first professional contract with Chelsea. Selling Reece James might seem like a harsh move, but there are solid reasons for Chelsea to consider it, even if he is a Blue born and bred.
